pages.text:
MediSight Data Platform Inc.

Period: Q2 2025

MediSight Data Platform Inc. ("MediSight") operates a cloud-based data platform for hospital systems, aggregating clinical, claims,
and operational data.

Key Metrics – Q2 2025

| Metric | Q2 2025 |
| --- | --- |
| Recognized Revenue | 6.8M |
| Gross Margin | 77% |
| Contracted ARR (end of period) | 27.9M |
| ARR Growth (YoY) | 31% |
| Expansion ARR as % of Total ARR | 87% |
| Total Headcount | 121 |

Selected Operating Observations

• No material customer churn was observed during the quarter.

• During Q2 2025, MediSight continued deploying its platform across two new hospital networks, requiring incremental hiring in
implementation and customer success.

• Several late-stage opportunities remain active with European hospital groups; management did not share probability-weighted
pipeline figures.

• Management continues to target Gross Margin in the mid- to high-70s.

Other Financial Information

Capitalized development costs in Q2 2025 amounted to 0.5M. No material write-downs of previously capitalized software were
recorded. Management is evaluating a second data centre region to support international expansion; no firm capital commitments
have been made.

(1) Contracted ARR represents annualized value of signed, active contracts; excludes renewals under negotiation.

(2) Expansion ARR % is equivalent to 'ARR from Existing Accounts' metric used in prior quarters.

(3) Average remaining contract term is not reported this quarter; last disclosed as 3.2 years in Q1 2025.

(4) Gross Margin excludes implementation and customer success costs.
